basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning, with interests in LLM Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning, Hallucination in Vision-Language Models (VLM), and LLM truthfulness and Interpretability.

work.summary: Research internship at MINIMAX focusing on large language models and machine learning.
Research internship at Tencent WeChat Group, working on vision-language models for chart understanding. Advisor: Zifei Shan.
Research internship at Shanghai AI Lab focusing on NLP and evaluation of large language models. Advisor: Prof. Yu Cheng.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: SynLogic synthesizes verifiable reasoning data at scale for learning logical reasoning and beyond.

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: Investigates the perception bottleneck in vision-language models for chart understanding.

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: Discovers a universal truthfulness hyperplane inside LLMs and proposes methods for hallucination mitigation.

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Uses inner representation sharpness as an alert mechanism for hallucination detection and mitigation in LLMs.

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: A comprehensive multi-level multi-discipline Chinese evaluation suite for assessing foundation models.

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Composes parameter-efficient modules (e.g., LoRA) with arithmetic operations to create new capabilities without retraining.
